## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command '...'
2. With input '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or tracebacks.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10.12]
- ads-ai version: [e.g., 0.2.0]
- Google GenAI SDK version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

- API key configured: [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Model used: [e.g., gemini-3.1-pro-preview]
- Any relevant `.env` settings (redacted):

```bash
# paste relevant config here (remove API keys)
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I am using a supported Python version (3.10+)
- [ ] I have installed all dependencies (`pip install -e ".[test]"`)
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue in a clean environment
